Live.Application.Application.View.add_is.reason: C++ signature shows TString for arg2; M4L docs use 'view_name' for view identifier strings.

Live.Application.Application.View.is_vie.reason: Same pattern as add_is_view_visible_listener; M4L docs use 'view_name' for view identifier strings.

Live.Application.Application.View.remove.reason: Same pattern as add/has listener siblings; M4L docs use 'view_name' for view identifier strings.

Live.Application.Application.View.scroll.reason: M4L docs name the parameters 'direction view_name modifier_pressed'.

Live.Application.Application.View.zoom_v.reason: M4L docs name the parameters 'direction view_name modifier_pressed'.

Live.Application.Application.has_option.reason: Description says 'the given entry exists in Options.txt'; the parameter is an option name string.

Live.Application.ControlDescriptionVecto.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the item to add.
Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of items.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.con.reason: Property returns a vector of ControlDescription items; the Vector class is ControlDescriptionVector.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.ena.reason: Bool parameter controls whether MIDI receive is enabled or disabled.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.gra.reason: M4L docs name this parameter 'control'; the int is a control ID.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.pad.reason: M4L docs describe pad_layout as 'symbol read-only', meaning it is a string.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.rel.reason: M4L docs name this parameter 'control'; the int is a control ID.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.sen.reason: M4L docs name this parameter 'midi_message'; shortened to 'message'.
Function sends a value tuple to a control; the parameter is the value payload.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.sub.reason: Same pattern as grab_control/release_control; the int is a control ID.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.typ.reason: Property name suggests a string identifier for the control surface type.

Live.Application.ControlSurfaceProxy.uns.reason: Same pattern as subscribe_to_control; the int is a control ID.

Live.Application.UnavailableFeatureVecto.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the item to add.
Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of items.

Live.Application.encrypt_challenge2.reason: Description says 'the given challenge'; the int is a challenge value to hash.

Live.Application.get_random_int.reason: Description says 'from the given range'; two ints define a range with begin and end.

Live.Base.FloatVector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the float value to add.

Live.Base.FloatVector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of values.

Live.Base.IntU64Vector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the int value to add.

Live.Base.IntU64Vector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of values.

Live.Base.IntVector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the int value to add.

Live.Base.IntVector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of values.

Live.Base.ObjectVector.append.reason: C++ signature shows boost::python::api::object; this is a generic object vector so type is Any. Arg also has generic name.

Live.Base.ObjectVector.extend.reason: C++ signature shows boost::python::api::object; this is a generic object vector so type is Any. Arg also has generic name.

Live.Base.StringVector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the string value to add.

Live.Base.StringVector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of values.

Live.Base.Text.text.reason: Text.text property stores a text string; TText C++ type maps to str in Python.

Live.Base.Vector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the LOM object to add.

Live.Base.Vector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of LOM objects.

Live.Base.log.reason: Standard logging function; the parameter is the message string to log.

Live.Base.subst_args.reason: These are positional substitution arguments for a Text template; the arg1-arg5 names are intentional and match the function's purpose.

Live.Browser.Browser.load_item.reason: Description says 'the provided browser item'; naming it 'item'.

Live.Browser.Browser.preview_item.reason: Description says 'the provided browser item'; naming it 'item'.

Live.Browser.Browser.relation_to_hotswap.reason: Description says 'the given browser item'; naming it 'item'.

Live.Browser.BrowserItemVector.append.reason: Standard vector append pattern; the parameter is the BrowserItem to add.

Live.Browser.BrowserItemVector.extend.reason: Standard vector extend pattern; the parameter is the iterable of BrowserItems.

Live.Chain.Chain.delete_device.reason: M4L docs name this parameter 'index'; description says 'identified by its index'.

Live.Chain.Chain.duplicate_device.reason: Description says 'at the given index'; consistent with delete_device naming.
